title: CPS Tracker
description: Fastest way to track your CPS (clicks per second)
body:
**CPS Tracker is a client mod that allows you to track your insane CPS. (image below)**


## How to Use:
Change the position of the left cps and right cps tracker on the gui found in the ingame settings.
![Settings ingame](https://i.imgur.com/lJs4EMK.png)
